title: Social and psychological effects of Coronavirus Disease (COVID-19)
author: Maria Bothou
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The current transmission of Coronavirus Disease (COVID-19) has raised multiple concerns across all over the world. Until now, no effective treatment has been established for COVID-19 and this virus may also affect young people or people who do not belong to a vulnerable group. This is a source of great anxiety for all people and results in more psychological problems. This article focuses on the social and psychological effects of COVID-19 and underlines some possible solutions.
